items.title: These 5 Stocks Will Replace Your Job
items.description: Back in 1999, when I enlisted in the Marine Corps, my base pay started at less than $1,000 a month. Even after four years and a promotion to corporal, I was making just over $1,300 living paycheck to paycheck. In total, my entire enlistment earned me less than $55,000. Fast forward to today, and I […]
